summary: We are in full execution mode for the China Going-Global joint report with IE Business School, with critical meetings this week to lock in the launch event, while simultaneously launching the Asia Start campaign and finalizing the Intelligent China program website.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the joint report 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global' with IE Business School, targeting a September launch at either Tech in Asia or the Tyson event in Singapore. This week is critical: Felix has meetings with both Tech in Asia and Tyson to confirm the event and distribution plan, while the team must translate the Chinese report, draft a one-pager proposal, and secure op-eds from deans and case studies. Meanwhile, the Asia Start campaign is live with two routes (AI and traditional) running through October, and the Intelligent China program website is nearly ready, with SCM campaign planning to follow. Additionally, we are translating Professor Li Wei's FT article and finalizing Professor Zhu Yang's article for publication. The new team dashboard is now active for tracking all projects.

meetings.title: Joint Report on Chinese Companies Going Global
meetings.summary: Team discusses a joint report with CKGSB on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, to be launched at Tech in Asia or Tyson event in Singapore in September. They plan to include op-eds from deans and case studies, with a working title 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Discussed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional), and introduced a new in-depth program 'Intelligent China' with modules in Beijing, Shanghai, and Shenzhen. Website nearly ready; SCM campaign to follow.

meetings.title: EU-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on EU-China relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies vs. governments in market operations.

decisions.text: Asia Start campaign will run two parallel routes for first month: AI (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
Intelligent China program targets foreigners, purely in English, with modules purchasable separately or together.
Joseph will defer to Ira's review on Sun Tianshu press release substance
